NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-21-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 613. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR NOV-08-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-07-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MATTHEW J. QUINLAN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUSEL FOR PLAINTIFF CHRISTINE ROENSCH IS GRANTED. TRIAL IS CURRENTLY SCHEDULED FOR NOVEMBER 18. MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL MAY BE MADE IN DEPARTMENT 206. MR. QUINLAN TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER WITH PLAINTIFF'S UPDATED CONTACT INFORMATION. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-01-2010 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew J. Quinlan of the Cartwright Law Firm (433.0444) counsel for plaintiff and moving to be relieved; Kelli E. George of the Law Offices of Thomas O'Hagan (510.587.1600) appearing via Court Call for defendant Vali Cooper & Associates.

No other appearances. Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: MATTHEW J. QUINLAN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUSEL FOR PLAINTIFF CHRISTINE ROENSCH is granted. Trial is currently scheduled for November 18. Motion to continue trial may be made in Department 206. Mr. Quinlan to submit a proposed form of order with plaintiff's updated contact information. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)
